hyperedges.label: Black + Orange Studio Dark theme family

TCNet node discovery + liveness protocol (Opt-IN/Opt-OUT/Status on port 60000 every 1000ms)
Atelier proposal composition: header + 2x2 deck grid + mixer column + bottom bar
Editorial studio dark visual language (palette + timecode typography + colored waveforms)
Design spec decisions (typography, separator, width, spacing, order)

nodes.label: Typography System
nodes.description: Title sans-serif, timecode large monospace (post-DSEG7 migration), BPM smaller monospace, chip labels uppercase small

nodes.label: Scaling / Responsive Behavior
nodes.description: TV layout stacks three variant sections vertically; each section uses full-width container with internal grid (3-col tower, 2-col card, 1-col row); page designed for portrait TV/monitor viewing

nodes.label: Default Album Art (Vinyl/CD Placeholder)
nodes.description: Square dark-gray placeholder image depicting a stylized vinyl record or CD disc. Centered concentric circles with a small spindle hole in the middle, rendered in near-monochrome charcoal/black tones. Used as a fallback artwork when no track album art is available.
nodes.style: minimal, monochrome, flat, dark charcoal (#2a2a2a / #1a1a1a), centered symmetric composition, low-contrast, placeholder aesthetic
nodes.depicts: vinyl record or CD disc with center label ring and spindle hole
nodes.purpose: fallback/default album artwork for DJ deck UI when metadata artwork missing

nodes.label: Default Album Art (Vinyl Record Placeholder)
nodes.description: Square PNG placeholder artwork depicting a stylized vinyl record / CD disc on a near-black background. A slightly lighter dark-gray circular disc occupies the center, with a concentric inner ring and a small center spindle dot. Minimalist, monochromatic, flat/silhouette style with no text or logos.
nodes.style: minimalist, flat, monochromatic dark, low-contrast, centered composition
nodes.shape: circular disc centered on square canvas
nodes.purpose: fallback artwork displayed when no album/track art is available

hyperedges.label: Black + Orange Studio Dark theme family
Deck-structure-preserving proposals that only swap :root token palette
TCNet node discovery + liveness protocol (Opt-IN/Opt-OUT/Status on port 60000 every 1000ms)
Atelier proposal composition: header + 2x2 deck grid + mixer column + bottom bar
Editorial studio dark visual language (palette + timecode typography + colored waveforms)
Design spec decisions (typography, separator, width, spacing, order)
